mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_water_sampling_point ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_water_sampling_point WHERE point_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_water_sampling_point WHERE point_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_water_sampling_point (workplace_id, point_name, location, remark, reg_user, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{workplaceId}, #{pointName}, #{location}, #{remark}, #{regUser}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_water_sampling_point SET workplace_id = #{workplaceId}, point_name = #{pointName}, location = #{location}, remark = #{remark}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
